# SCAN(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  scan — active network reconnaissance scanner

## SYNOPSIS
  scan [target]

## DESCRIPTION
Scans the NexusCorp network and returns a list of connected nodes with their
IP addresses, open ports, and accessibility status.

## EXAMPLES
  scan
  scan local
  scan nexus-gateway

## NODES
  node-1         10.0.1.1    — Edge node, minimal monitoring
  chimera-control 10.0.1.254 — CHIMERA control interface (restricted)
  nexus-gateway   10.0.1.2   — Internet gateway

## SEE ALSO
  connect, nmap, ping, hack
